# Team Logos

Place team logo images in this folder and they will automatically show up on the `/matches` page.

Expected filenames (PNG recommended):

- `csk.png`
- `dc.png`
- `gt.png`
- `kkr.png`
- `lsg.png`
- `mi.png`
- `pbks.png`
- `rr.png`
- `rcb.png`
- `srh.png`

Notes:

- Keep the image roughly square (e.g. 256x256) with transparent background if possible.
- The app will fall back to a text badge if a logo file is missing.
